title: LV Prasad Eye Institute is Hiring: Consultant Physician (Entry-Level)

jsonLd.title: LV Prasad Eye Institute is Hiring: Consultant Physician (Entry-Level)
jsonLd.description:
LV Prasad Eye Institute, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Consultant Physician for our Allahabad operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About LV Prasad Eye Institute:
LV Prasad Eye Institute is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Provide high-quality patient care and maintain patient records
• Attend continuing medical education programs and training
• Administer medications and treatments as prescribed
• Adhere to NABH/JCI accreditation standards
• Diagnose and treat medical conditions following established protocols
• Respond to medical emergencies and provide immediate care
• Collaborate with pharmaceutical representatives and medical suppliers

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Diagnostic Skills
• Proficiency in ICU Management
• Proficiency in HIPAA Compliance
• Proficiency in Telemedicine
• Proficiency in EMR/EHR
• Proficiency in NABH Standards
• Proficiency in Medical Coding
• Proficiency in BLS/ACLS

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Flexible working hours
• Annual performance appraisal
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Professional development and training programs
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Allahabad, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with LV Prasad Eye Institute!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
